title: rhododendron campylocarpum subsp. caloxanthum
intro: Rhododendron campylocarpum subsp. caloxanthum, also known as the Himalayan rhododendron, is a subspecies of flowering plant native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Rhododendron campylocarpum subsp. caloxanthum is often used to make teas, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from digestive issues to skin problems.
